changelog: User registration — new traders can sign up
Email verification — account activation via email
Login now accepts username or email
Create Account link on login page
Email verified check before login allowed

db_migrations.name: add_email_column
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN email VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL

db_migrations.name: add_email_verified_column
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN email_verified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0

db_migrations.name: add_verification_token_column
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN verification_token VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL

db_migrations.name: add_created_at_column
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

db_migrations.name: mark_existing_users_verified
db_migrations.sql: UPDATE users SET email_verified = 1 WHERE email IS NULL OR email = ''
